description_long: This hammer features a robust, metallic head with a spherical central section and a distinctive, angular striking face on one side. The opposite end of the head is equipped with a pointed, wedge-like extension, suggesting a specialized function such as demolition or masonry work. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood, with visible segmentations or grip enhancements along its length for improved handling. The finish of the hammer is a warm, brownish metallic tone, giving it a slightly aged, utilitarian appearance. The head is securely mounted to the handle, and the overall construction looks solid and durable, suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present on the hammer.
description: A heavy-duty hammer with a spherical metallic head, angular striking face, and a straight, segmented wooden handle. The finish is a warm brown metallic, and the design is robust and utilitarian.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, segmented handle and the spherical head with an angular striking face and wedge-like extension.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular face of the head and the pointed wedge extension, with the handle extending directly backward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the handle and the head's features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the handle's end and the back of the spherical head, with the wedge extension visible at the top.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with segmented grip enhancements, cylindrical in shape.
attribute_head_type: Spherical metallic head with an angular striking face and a pointed wedge extension, resembling a specialized demolition or masonry hammer.
